languageSwitcher.toggleLabel: Current language: {{language}}. Click to switch language.

hero.title: Turn your daily chaos into ruthless focus.
hero.subtitle: No more scattered tools. Tasks, habits, and calendar flow perfectly in one local-first command center.

items.tabs: Too many tabs and no single command center.
items.disconnectedPlanning: Daily planning breaks when meetings and tasks are disconnected.
items.busyWork: Hard to know if progress is real or just busy work.

stat.label: Context switching cost
stat.description: The average professional loses around 2 hours a day just switching context between tabs, chats, and scattered tools.

axis.label: Axis signal

items.widgets: Widgets keep all critical signals on one board.
items.sharedView: Time, tasks, habits, and focus cycles live in the same view.
items.analysis: The analysis panel compares last month vs this month automatically.

axis.testimonial: I use Axis every day to track priorities and finish the day with less friction.
axis.author: Gabriel Leal

tasks.title: Close tasks before they become noise
tasks.description: Capture, prioritize, and finish daily tasks in one place with clear status and fast completion flow.

habitTracker.title: Build consistency with visible streaks
habitTracker.description: Track routines with streak history and quick daily check-ins so habits stay active instead of forgotten.

pomodoro.title: Protect deep work with focused cycles
pomodoro.description: Start focus sessions, pause when needed, and reset instantly to keep momentum through real work blocks.

kanban.title: See execution flow at a glance
kanban.description: Move cards across stages and spot blockers quickly with a board designed for continuous delivery.

calendar.title: Plan your week with real context
calendar.description: Keep deadlines, meetings, and planned work aligned so the week stays realistic and under control.

tasks.activeNote: Task completed and cleared from the queue.

analysis.headline: Track. Compare. Compound.
analysis.subtitle: See exactly how much your focus and habits are growing week over week. Your baseline is constantly evolving.

zeroLag.title: Zero-Lag Speed
zeroLag.description: No cloud, no slowdown. Your tasks, timers, and habits respond instantly on your machine.

focus.title: Unbreakable Focus
focus.description: No browser tabs pulling you away. A closed environment designed exclusively for execution and deep work.

openSource.title: Open Source and Transparent
openSource.description: Your control panel, your rules. Fully open source and built to respect your privacy from day one.

footer.cta: Execute with ruthless focus. Zero friction.
